SignIn.metaDescription: Sign in to Veta. Interior design project management platform.
SignIn.title: Sign in
SignIn.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in link.
SignIn.descriptionSessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in to continue.
SignIn.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
SignIn.emailSentDescription: We've sent a magic link to
SignIn.emailSentClick: Click the link in the email to sign in. The link will expire in a few minutes.
SignIn.emailSentNoEmail: If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder or try again.
SignIn.toastSuccess: Check your email. We've sent you a link to sign in.
SignIn.toastResend: Link resent. Check your email again.
SignIn.toastEmailUpdated: Your email has been updated. You can now sign in with your new address.

SignUp.metaDescription: Sign up for Veta. Interior design project management platform. Try free.
SignUp.title: Create your account
SignUp.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a confirmation message to verify your address and activate your account.
SignUp.acceptTermsPrefix: I have read and agree to the
SignUp.termsLink: terms of use and privacy policy
SignUp.acceptTermsError: You must accept the terms of use and privacy policy
SignUp.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
SignUp.emailSentDescription: We've sent a confirmation email to
SignUp.emailSentClick: Open the email and click the button to confirm your address and finish creating your account. The link expires after a short time.
SignUp.emailSentNoEmail: If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder or try again.
SignUp.toastSuccess: Check your email. We've sent a confirmation message to complete your registration.
SignUp.toastResend: Confirmation email resent. Check your inbox again.
